displayNameZh: Pencil 工具 Logo 动画介绍
summary: Yt Pencil Intro component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的Pencil 工具 Logo 动画介绍组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-pencil-intro/src/YtPencilIntro.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtPencilIntro` and `ytPencilIntroDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Pencil Intro Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-pencil-intro to my project. Preserve the exported YtPencilIntroProps API and register the YtPencilIntro composition with the default props.
